# co-op.care

> Worker-owned cooperative care powered by physician-supervised AI. Caregivers earn $25-28/hr W-2 with equity. Families get companion care that pays for itself through HSA/FSA.

## What we do
co-op.care is a Colorado Limited Cooperative Association (LCA) providing companion care, advance care planning, and community services. AI handles scheduling, documentation, and billing. A physician reviews every clinical output. Caregivers are W-2 with equity (target turnover: 15% vs industry 77%).

## Products
- **Companion Care**: $35/hr, W-2 caregivers, physician-supervised
- **CareGoals**: Free advance directive through AI-guided conversation
- **ComfortCard**: Digital care identity (Apple Wallet, QR, NFC) with directive, emergency contacts, medications
- **HSA/FSA Savings**: Letter of Medical Necessity unlocks pre-tax payment (saves 28-36%)

## Pricing
- Free: Advance directive conversation with Sage AI
- $59/mo: Family membership (ComfortCard, companion care access, HSA eligibility)
- Companion care: $35/hr (cooperative rate, 30%+ below market)

## CMS alignment
- AFHM attestation (May 15, 2026 deadline) — covers all 5 domains
- CJR-X episode support for post-surgical home care
- CCM/RPM/RTM billing infrastructure

## Who we are
co-op.care Technologies LLC (Colorado LCA). Co-founders: Blaine Warkentine, MD and Josh Emdur, DO (50-state licensed hospitalist, Medical Director).

## Links
- Website: https://co-op.care
- CareGoals: https://caregoals.com
- ComfortCard: https://comfortcard.org
- Parent platform: https://solvinghealth.com
- SurgeonValue: https://surgeonvalue.com

## MCP connector
```json
"coop-care": {
  "command": "npx",
  "args": ["-y", "@anthropic-ai/mcp-remote",
    "https://solvinghealth.com/mcp"]
}
```
